contract.purpose: Load and validate runtime configuration, provider keys, and feature flags

export-loadConfig.PURPOSE: Validate and return typed app configuration

contract.purpose: Provide structured logging and audit helpers for all modules

export-createLogger.PURPOSE: Create module-scoped logger with audit fields

contract.purpose: Resolve and validate workspace scope from request/job context

export-resolveWorkspaceContext.PURPOSE: Resolve canonical workspace identity and auth scope

contract.purpose: Manage region packs, curated source lists, and source_list_version lineage

export-getRegionPack.PURPOSE: Return region pack config and source list policy

export-listPackSources.PURPOSE: Return source list for region pack version

contract.purpose: Apply source usage policy, PII redaction rules, and query abuse guardrails

export-validateSourcePolicy.PURPOSE: Validate source operation against policy matrix

export-redactPii.PURPOSE: Apply regex-based redaction at ingest stage

contract.purpose: Persist indexed chunks, embeddings, lexical indices, and POI entities under workspace/pack/version scope

export-upsertPoiEntities.PURPOSE: Store canonical/provisional POI entities and links

contract.purpose: Generate multilingual embeddings using Voyage AI
Rerank candidate evidence passages with provider reranker
Fetch raw records from Telegram, Reddit, Tabelog, and curated web connectors

export-fetchSourceRecords.PURPOSE: Fetch records for incremental or backfill mode

contract.purpose: Deduplicate records using exact hash, near-dup signatures, and canonical URL normalization

export-deduplicateRecords.PURPOSE: Return unique records and duplicate clusters

M-INGEST-PIPELINE.NAME: IngestPipeline

contract.purpose: Run end-to-end ingest pipeline fetch -> normalize -> detect language -> redact PII -> dedup -> chunk -> embed -> index

export-runIngest.PURPOSE: Execute one ingest run for source and scope

M-INGEST-PIPELINE.depends: M-INGEST-CONNECTORS, M-DEDUP-ENGINE, M-EMBEDDING-ADAPTER, M-INDEX-STORE, M-SOURCE-POLICY, M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY, M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT, M-LOGGER

contract.purpose: Schedule and monitor per-source backfill jobs with checkpointed resume/retry behavior

export-startBackfill.PURPOSE: Start backfill for source and time window

contract.purpose: Build query expansion variants for lexical retrieval (RU↔EN and alias hooks)

export-expandQuery.PURPOSE: Return lexical variants and normalized forms

M-RETRIEVAL-ENGINE.NAME: RetrievalEngine

contract.purpose: Run hybrid retrieval and candidate fusion with dedup and rerank for evidence-first output

export-runRetrieval.PURPOSE: Return ranked evidence candidates with match signals

M-RETRIEVAL-ENGINE.depends: M-INDEX-STORE, M-EMBEDDING-ADAPTER, M-RERANK-ADAPTER, M-QUERY-EXPANDER, M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY, M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT, M-SOURCE-POLICY, M-LOGGER

contract.purpose: Build stable evidence object payloads for MCP tool responses

export-buildEvidence.PURPOSE: Format deterministic evidence objects with citations and context

contract.purpose: Lookup place candidates from Google Maps/Tabelog adapters for verification and enrichment

export-lookupPlace.PURPOSE: Resolve external place candidates by URL/id/name+geo

contract.purpose: Resolve canonical place, create provisional place when unknown, and maintain lazy POI graph

export-resolveOrCreatePlace.PURPOSE: Resolve canonical place or create provisional record

contract.purpose: Provide deterministic verification primitives for map and Tabelog links

export-validateGoogleMapLink.PURPOSE: Validate map URL against expected attributes

export-verifyTabelog.PURPOSE: Validate Tabelog entity against expected attributes

contract.purpose: Route uncertain verification cases to reviewer queue and apply review decisions

M-SERVER.NAME: McpServerEntry

contract.purpose: Expose public MCP retrieval/verification tools and admin/internal operational tools

export-startServer.PURPOSE: Boot MCP transport and register tools

M-SERVER.depends: M-CONFIG, M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT, M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY, M-SOURCE-POLICY, M-INGEST-PIPELINE, M-BACKFILL-JOBS, M-EVIDENCE-BUILDER, M-VERIFICATION-ENGINE, M-HITL-QUEUE, M-LOGGER

DF-INGEST-INCREMENTAL.NAME: Incremental Ingestion
DF-INGEST-INCREMENTAL.step-1: Resolve workspace scope and region pack version
DF-INGEST-INCREMENTAL.step-2: Fetch records from connector using source cursor
DF-INGEST-INCREMENTAL.step-3: Normalize text, detect language, redact PII
DF-INGEST-INCREMENTAL.step-5: Chunk, embed, and index records with lineage (`workspace_id`,`region_pack_id`,`source_list_version`)
DF-INGEST-INCREMENTAL.step-6: Persist sync cursor and ingest audit logs

DF-BACKFILL.NAME: Source Backfill
DF-BACKFILL.step-3: Create checkpointed jobs by source and time slice
DF-BACKFILL.step-4: Fetch/index historical records with resume/retry support
DF-BACKFILL.step-5: Expose progress status and checkpoint state

DF-SEARCH-CONTEXT.NAME: Evidence Search
DF-SEARCH-CONTEXT.step-1: Validate workspace/pack/version and query abuse policy
DF-SEARCH-CONTEXT.step-3: Run lexical retrieval over variants and vector retrieval over multilingual embedding
DF-SEARCH-CONTEXT.step-5: Build and return deterministic evidence objects (no truth/final score)

DF-VERIFY-LINKS.NAME: Link and POI Verification
DF-VERIFY-LINKS.step-1: Validate request scope and parse expected attributes
DF-VERIFY-LINKS.step-2: Lookup provider candidates from map/tabelog adapter
DF-VERIFY-LINKS.step-5: If uncertain, enqueue HITL review and return confidence + reasons

DF-HITL-REVIEW.NAME: POI Human Review
DF-HITL-REVIEW.step-3: Update canonical/provisional entities and link mappings
DF-HITL-REVIEW.step-4: Persist decision for audit and resolver improvements

DF-WEEKLY-GUARDRAILS.NAME: Weekly Quality Guardrails
DF-WEEKLY-GUARDRAILS.step-3: Run connector replay fixtures and contract checks
DF-WEEKLY-GUARDRAILS.step-4: Perform manual validator error audit sample
DF-WEEKLY-GUARDRAILS.step-5: Block release if any guardrail threshold is violated

Phase-1.name: Foundation
Phase-1.step-1: Implement typed config and feature flag loading
Phase-1.step-2: Implement structured logging and audit fields
Phase-1.step-4: Implement region pack + source list version registry
Phase-1.step-5: Implement source policy matrix, PII redaction, abuse filters

Phase-2.name: Ingest and Storage
Phase-2.step-3: Implement Telegram and Reddit connectors first
Phase-2.step-4: Implement exact and near-dup dedup pipeline
Phase-2.step-5: Implement full ingest pipeline with lineage fields

Phase-3.name: Retrieval Surface
Phase-3.step-1: Implement RU↔EN expansion and alias hooks
Phase-3.step-5: Expose public `search_context` and admin backfill tools

Phase-4.name: Verification Surface
Phase-4.step-1: Implement Google Maps and Tabelog lookup adapters
Phase-4.step-2: Implement lazy canonical + provisional POI model
Phase-4.step-5: Expose public verify tools and internal review tools

Phase-5.name: Guardrails v1
Phase-5.step-1: Add connector contract tests and replay fixtures
Phase-5.step-3: Add weekly manual validator audit output

RiskAssessment.RISK-001: Schema/contract drift between MCP tools and downstream agent expectations
RiskAssessment.RISK-002: Connector breakages due to source API/markup changes
RiskAssessment.RISK-003: Cross-language recall gaps if query expansion is weak
RiskAssessment.RISK-004: Policy non-compliance if source usage matrix is incomplete
RiskAssessment.RISK-005: Smoke-set overfitting due to small evaluation set
